As a [role, e.g. maintainer or contributor], I want to [feature, e.g. "add Codex harness support"] so that [impact, e.g. "I can route issues to Codex sessions"].

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] [Describe a concrete outcome, e.g. "The daemon can start Codex sessions for configured repositories."]
- [ ] [Describe observable behavior, e.g. "README.md documents any new setup or usage steps."]
- [ ] [Describe validation, e.g. "Relevant automated tests cover the new behavior."]
